nasb.text: not because we do not have the right to this, but in order to offer ourselves as a model for you, so that you would follow our example.

esv.text: It was not because we do not have that right, but to give you in ourselves an example to imitate.

cnv.text: 這不是因為我們沒有權利，而是要給你們作榜樣，好讓你們效法我們。

ccb.text: 我们并不是没有权利接受供应，而是要给你们树立学习的榜样。

csbs.text: 这并不是因为我们没有这权利，而是要亲自给你们做榜样，好让你们效法我们。
